SCENARIO:

(CW: Mentions of slight non-con, Risky and/or Hate-sex)

Durin had been so eager to host a slumber party, ironically in Layla's spacious home instead of his own. You and your group of friends (consisting of Albedo, Layla, Faruzan, and Scaramouche) were quite hesitant at first, yet Durin's pleading was just so adorable and pure that none of you could turn him down.

NSFW CUT:

It was quite an eventful night filled with banter, board games, a movie marathon, and a few spilled secrets here and there. Though as the night had taken the sky, it had become evidently late enough to call it quits and rest. Just as you had all become comfortable, there was this unspoken tension of lust between you and Scaramouche. One that the other could barely hold to ignore.

It was quite thrilling, really. The thought of a possibility to be caught under the relentless rustling of the thick blanket, a few stifled sounds under skin and cushions... Just make sure no one wakes up to actually spot you, okay~?
